    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBRN CLI - Command line interface for RBRN nameplate regime operations
    20→#
    21→# Differential furnish: light deps (validate, render) always loaded;
    22→# heavy deps (survey, audit) loaded only when needed.
    23→
    24→set -euo pipefail
    25→
    26→# Source dependencies
    27→source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
    28→
    29→######################################################################
    30→# Internal Helpers
    31→
    32→# Fleet info table — non-opinionated display of all nameplate configuration
    33→# Requires: RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded (via differential furnish)
    34→zrbrn_fleet_survey() {
    35→  zrbcc_sentinel
    36→  zrbgc_sentinel
    37→  zrbgd_sentinel
    38→  zrbrr_sentinel
    39→
    40→  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    41→  local -r z_row_fmt="%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n"
    42→  echo ""
    43→  printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
    44→    "Moniker" "Entry" "WS" "Enc" "Subnet" "Sentry IP" "Bottle IP" "Snt" "Btl"
    45→  printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
    46→    "--------" "-----" "------" "------" "-----------------" "--------------" "--------------" "---" "---"
    47→
    48→  local z_sv_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}"*"${RBCC_rbrn_ext}")
    49→  local z_sv_i=""
    50→  for z_sv_i in "${!z_sv_files[@]}"; do
    51→    test -f "${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}" || continue
    52→    (
    53→      source "${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}" || buc_die "Failed to source: ${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}"
    54→
    55→      local z_sentry_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
    56→      local z_bottle_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
    57→
    58→      local z_sentry_local="--"
    59→      local z_bottle_local="--"
    60→      if command -v "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    61→        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_sentry_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_sentry_local="ok"
    62→        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_bottle_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_bottle_local="ok"
    63→      else
    64→        z_sentry_local="??"
    65→        z_bottle_local="??"
    66→      fi
    67→
    68→      local z_ws_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
    69→      local z_enc_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
    70→      if [[ "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" != "enabled" ]]; then
    71→        z_ws_port="-"
    72→        z_enc_port="-"
    73→      fi
    74→
    75→      printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
    76→        "${RBRN_MONIKER}" "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" "${z_ws_port}" "${z_enc_port}" \
    77→        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}" \
    78→        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" \
    79→        "${z_sentry_local}" "${z_bottle_local}" || buc_die "Failed to printf survey row"
    80→    ) || buc_die "Survey isolation failed for: ${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}"
    81→  done
    82→  echo ""
    83→}
    84→
    85→######################################################################
    86→# Command Functions
    87→
    88→# Command: validate - enrollment-based validation report
    89→rbrn_validate() {
    90→  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRN nameplate regime configuration via enrollment report"
    91→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    92→
    93→  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
    94→    rbrn_list
    95→    buc_die "Nameplate moniker required"
    96→  fi
    97→  buc_step "Validating RBRN nameplate regime"
    98→  buv_report RBRN "Nameplate Regime"
    99→  buc_step "RBRN nameplate valid"
   100→}
   101→
   102→# Command: render - diagnostic display
   103→rbrn_render() {
   104→  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRN nameplate regime configuration"
   105→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   106→
   107→  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
   108→    rbrn_list
   109→    buc_die "Nameplate moniker required"
   110→  fi
   111→  buv_render RBRN "RBRN - Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate"
   112→}
   113→
   114→# Command: survey - fleet info table across all nameplates
   115→rbrn_survey() {
   116→  buc_doc_brief "Display fleet info table for all nameplate configurations"
   117→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   118→
   119→  zrbrn_fleet_survey
   120→}
   121→
   122→# Command: audit - survey display then preflight validation
   123→rbrn_audit() {
   124→  buc_doc_brief "Survey all nameplates and run cross-nameplate preflight validation"
   125→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   126→
   127→  zrbrn_fleet_survey
   128→  rbrn_preflight
   129→  buc_step "Cross-nameplate audit passed"
   130→
   131→  buc_step "Full audit passed (nameplates)"
   132→}
   133→
   134→# Command: list - show available nameplate monikers
   135→rbrn_list() {
   136→  buc_doc_brief "List available nameplate monikers"
   137→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   138→
   139→  local z_monikers
   140→  z_monikers=$(rbrn_list_capture) || buc_die "No nameplates found"
   141→  buc_step "Available nameplates:"
   142→  local z_moniker=""
   143→  for z_moniker in ${z_monikers}; do
   144→    buc_bare "        ${z_moniker}"
   145→  done
   146→}
   147→
   148→######################################################################
   149→# Furnish and Main
   150→

    18→#

    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
    24→
    25→######################################################################
    26→# Internal Functions
    27→
    28→# Module-scoped arrays and timestamps for BCG file rewrite — populated by refresh commands
    29→ZRBRR_IMAGE_LINES=()
    30→ZRBRR_BINARY_LINES=()
    31→ZRBRR_IMAGE_PINS_REFRESHED_AT=""
    32→ZRBRR_BINARY_PINS_REFRESHED_AT=""
    33→
    34→# BCG compliant: write complete RBRG file from image + binary pin arrays, replace atomically
    35→# Caller must populate ZRBRR_IMAGE_LINES, ZRBRR_BINARY_LINES, and both REFRESHED_AT values.
    36→zrbrr_write_rbrg() {
    37→  local z_vintage="$1"
    38→  local z_temp_file="$2"
    39→  local -r z_rbrg_file="${RBBC_rbrg_file}"
    40→  {
    41→    echo '#!/bin/bash'
    42→    echo '# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.'
    43→    echo '#'
    44→    echo '# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");'
    45→    echo '# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.'
    46→    echo '# You may obtain a copy of the License at'
    47→    echo '#'
    48→    echo '#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0'
    49→    echo '#'
    50→    echo '# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software'
    51→    echo '# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,'
    52→    echo '# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.'
    53→    echo '# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and'
    54→    echo '# limitations under the License.'
    55→    echo '#'
    56→    echo '# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>'
    57→    echo '#'
    58→    echo "# RBRG - GCB Pins (refreshed ~${z_vintage})"
    59→    echo ''
    60→    local z_line=""
    61→    for z_line in "${ZRBRR_IMAGE_LINES[@]}"; do
    62→      echo "${z_line}"
    63→    done
    64→    echo ''
    65→    for z_line in "${ZRBRR_BINARY_LINES[@]}"; do
    66→      echo "${z_line}"
    67→    done
    68→    echo ''
    69→    echo "RBRG_IMAGE_PINS_REFRESHED_AT=${ZRBRR_IMAGE_PINS_REFRESHED_AT}"
    70→    echo "RBRG_BINARY_PINS_REFRESHED_AT=${ZRBRR_BINARY_PINS_REFRESHED_AT}"
    71→    echo ''
    72→    echo '# eof'
    73→  } > "${z_temp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write temporary RBRG file"
    74→  mv "${z_temp_file}" "${z_rbrg_file}" || buc_die "Failed to replace RBRG file"
    75→}
    76→
    77→######################################################################
    78→# Command Functions
    79→
    80→# Command: validate - enrollment-based validation report
    81→rbrr_validate() {
    82→  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRR repo regime configuration via enrollment report"
    83→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    84→
    85→  buc_step "Validating RBRR repo regime file: ${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
    86→  buv_report RBRR "Repository Regime"
    87→  buc_step "RBRR repo regime valid"
    88→}
    89→
    90→# Command: render - diagnostic display of all RBRR fields
    91→rbrr_render() {
    92→  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRR repo regime configuration"
    93→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    94→
    95→  buv_render RBRR "RBRR - Recipe Bottle Regime Repo"
    96→}
    97→
    98→# Command: validate_pins - enrollment-based validation report for RBRG pins
    99→rbrr_validate_pins() {
   100→  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRG pin regime configuration via enrollment report"
   101→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   102→
   103→  buc_step "Validating RBRG pin file: ${RBBC_rbrg_file}"
   104→  buv_report RBRG "GCB Pins Regime"
   105→  buc_step "RBRG pin regime valid"
   106→}
   107→
   108→# Command: render_pins - diagnostic display of all RBRG fields
   109→rbrr_render_pins() {
   110→  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRG pin regime configuration"
   111→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   112→
   113→  buv_render RBRG "RBRG - GCB Pins Regime"
   114→}
   115→
   116→# Command: refresh_gcb_pins - resolve image tags to digests and write complete RBRG file
   117→# BCG compliant: discovers all values, writes complete file from scratch, replaces atomically.
   118→# Every step must succeed or the function dies — no partial updates.
   119→# Requires: docker, jq, curl, BURD_NOW_STAMP set, BURD_TEMP_DIR set
   120→rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins() {
   121→  buc_doc_brief "Resolve image tags to digests and write complete RBRG pin file"
   122→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   123→
   124→  local -r z_rbrg_file="${RBBC_rbrg_file}"
   125→  test -f "${z_rbrg_file}" || buc_die "RBRG config not found: ${z_rbrg_file}"
   126→  zburd_sentinel
   127→
   128→  buc_countdown 5 "NOTE: Docker anonymous login is heavily rate limited.  Try again in 6 hours if you see that fail.  Continuing in:"
   129→
   130→  local -r z_vintage="${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
   131→  local -r z_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrg_refresh_"
   132→
   133→  local z_oras_token_file="${z_prefix}oras_token.json"
   134→  local z_oras_tags_file="${z_prefix}oras_tags.json"
   135→  local z_oras_token_value_file="${z_prefix}oras_token_value.txt"
   136→  local z_oras_tag_file="${z_prefix}oras_tag.txt"
   137→  local z_oras_token_stderr="${z_prefix}oras_token_stderr.txt"

     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#

    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBRA CLI - Command line interface for RBRA credential operations
    20→#
    21→# Manifold regime: BUZ_FOLIO carries role name (governor, retriever, director).
    22→# Role resolves to RBRA file path via RBRR references.
    23→
    24→set -euo pipefail
    25→
    26→source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
    27→
    28→######################################################################
    29→# Internal Helpers
    30→
    31→# Resolve role name to RBRA file path via RBRR
    32→zrbra_resolve_role() {
    33→  local z_role="${1:-}"
    34→  test -n "${z_role}" || buc_die "RBRA role required (governor|retriever|director)"
    35→
    36→  zrbrr_sentinel
    37→
    38→  case "${z_role}" in
    39→    governor)  echo "${RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}" ;;
    40→    retriever) echo "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" ;;
    41→    director)  echo "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" ;;
    42→    *)         buc_die "Unknown RBRA role: ${z_role}. Valid roles: governor, retriever, director" ;;
    43→  esac
    44→}
    45→
    46→######################################################################
    47→# Command Functions
    48→
    49→rbra_validate() {
    50→  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRA credential regime configuration via enrollment report"
    51→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    52→
    53→  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
    54→    rbra_list
    55→    buc_die "RBRA role required"
    56→  fi
    57→  buc_step "Validating RBRA credential regime"
    58→  buv_report RBRA "Credential Regime"
    59→  buc_step "RBRA credential valid"
    60→}
    61→
    62→rbra_render() {
    63→  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRA credential regime configuration"
    64→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    65→
    66→  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
    67→    rbra_list
    68→    buc_die "RBRA role required"
    69→  fi
    70→  buv_render RBRA "RBRA - Recipe Bottle Authentication Regime"
    71→}
    72→
    73→rbra_list() {
    74→  buc_doc_brief "List RBRA credential roles and file paths"
    75→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    76→
    77→  zrbrr_sentinel
    78→
    79→  buc_step "RBRA credential roles (from RBRR):"
    80→  local z_roles=("governor" "retriever" "director")
    81→  local z_vars=("RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE" "RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE" "RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE")
    82→
    83→  local z_i
    84→  for z_i in "${!z_roles[@]}"; do
    85→    local z_role="${z_roles[$z_i]}"
    86→    local z_path="${!z_vars[$z_i]:-}"
    87→    local z_status="missing"
    88→    test -f "${z_path}" && z_status="ok"
    89→    buc_step "  ${z_role} [${z_status}] ${z_path}"
    90→  done
    91→}
    92→
    93→######################################################################
    94→# Furnish and Main
    95→
    96→zrbra_furnish() {
    97→  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
    98→  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
    99→  buc_doc_env_done || return 0
   100→
